typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	folder_path as string,
	input_file_name as string
}
source(output(
		ACCOUNT_CODE_ITEM as string,
		AGREEMENT_NUMBER as string,
		BUYER as string,
		BUYER_EMAIL_ID as string,
		CATEGORY_ID as string,
		CURRENCY as string,
		END_DATE as string,
		FIRST_PO_VERSION_RECEIVE_DATE as string,
		FIRST_PO_VERSION_RECEIVE_DATE1 as string,
		FIRST_PO_VER_REC_DATE as string,
		INCOTERM as string,
		INIT_REV_LINE_AMT as string,
		LAST_UPDATE_DATE as string,
		MATERIAL_WORK_GROUP as string,
		MPP_PO as string,
		ORIGINALORDEREDAMOUNTDISPLAY as string,
		PAYMENT_MODE as string,
		PO_ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_DATE as string,
		PO_ACK_DATE_POV as string,
		PO_ACK_DATE_POV1 as string,
		PO_APPROVED_DATE as string,
		PO_APPROVER as string,
		PO_CLOSED_DATE as string,
		PO_CREATION_DATE as string,
		PO_DESCRIPTION as string,
		PO_NO as string,
		PO_REV as string,
		PO_REV_2 as string,
		PO_STATUS as string,
		PROJECT_ID as string,
		PROJECT_NAME as string,
		PURCHASER_REQUESTER as string,
		REQUESTER_EMAIL_ID as string,
		REQUISITION_BU as string,
		REQUISITION_DATE as string,
		REQUISITION_NO_ as string,
		REQUISITION_ORIGINATOR as string,
		REQ_RELEASED_TO_PROC as string,
		REVISED_DATE as string,
		SELECTION_CODE as string,
		SMAT_REV_NO as string,
		SOURCE_BASE_POH_ID as string,
		SOURCE_POH_ID as string,
		SPMAT_PO_NUMBER as string,
		START_DATE as string,
		SUPPLIER as string,
		SUPPLIER_COUNTRY as string,
		SUPPLIER_COUNTRY_CODE as string,
		SUPPLIER_LOCATION as string,
		SUPPLIER_NUM as string,
		SUPPLIER_TYPE as string,
		USD as string,
		source_name as string,
		sub_source_name as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'File_Path',
	wildcardPaths:[($folder_path+'/'+$input_file_name+'_*.csv')]) ~> srcR2PStage
srcR2PStage derive(File_Path = concat(concat(trim(substringIndex($folder_path,'/',4),'/'),'/'),substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$input_file_name,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'File_Path',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkR2PRaw
